response.justification: Mohammed is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of production experience across web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, and his recent MCP code-generator and agentic-workflow tooling work at re:cinq is directly relevant. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI solutions, and his hands-on GenAI experience spans roughly one year. The resume shows no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python — all core requirements — and no clear customer-facing technical discovery or consulting leadership at the staff level this forward-deployed role demands.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP server and agentic-workflow tooling experience at re:cinq
15+ years of broad production engineering (TypeScript/Node, AWS CDK, low-latency microservices)
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Falls far short of the 8+ years required experience building AI-driven solutions (~1 year)
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, LLM evaluation, or data-pipeline-for-AI experience
No Python listed and limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing discovery/consulting work

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic tooling work plus strong general engineering
